scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT
    [Sl. No],
    [Patient ID],
    [Date of Registration],
    [Date of First Consultation],
    [Date of Latest Consultation],
    [Overall Satisfaction Rating],
    [Admission],
    [Surgery Underwent],
    [Total Number of Visits]
FROM dbo.raw_patients',
{Date of First Consultation} = toDate(byName('Date of First Consultation'),'M/d/yyyy'),
{Date of Latest Consultation} = toDate(byName('Date of Latest Consultation'),'M/d/yyyy'),
{Total Number of Visits} = toInteger(byName('Total Number of Visits')),

query: 'SELECT
    [Serial No],
    [Case ID],
    [Patient ID],
    [Branch ID],
    [Date of Consultation],
    [Requested Doctor ID],
    [Consulted Doctor ID],
    [Reason for Visit],
    [Diagnosis],
    [Prescribed Medication],
    [Followup Required],
    [Nutritionist Recommended]
FROM dbo.raw_appointments',

query: 'SELECT
    [Serial No],
    [Claim ID],
    [Patient ID],
    [Case ID],
    [Branch ID],
    [Total Bill],
    [Insurance Provider],
    [Amount Covered],
    [Out-of-Pocket Expenses],
    [Claim Status]
FROM dbo.raw_billing',

query: 'SELECT
    [Sl. No],
    [Branch ID],
    [Location],
    [OT_Available],
    [Inhouse Anesthetician],
    [No. of OTs], 
    [Inhouse Pharmacy],
    [Inhouse Nutritionist],
    [Inpatient Rooms],
    [Luxury Suite Rooms],
    [Prayer Room],
    [Kids Play Area]
FROM dbo.raw_branches',
{Kids Play Area} = iif(upper(trim(byName('Kids Play Area'))) == 'YES', 1, 0)) ~> derivebranches

query: 'SELECT
    [Sl. No],
    [Doctor Name],
    [Doctor ID],
    [Specialization],
    [Qualification],
    [Surgery Experience],
    [Practicing Branch],
    [Other Branches Visited]
FROM dbo.raw_doctors',
{Other Branches Visited} = trim(byName('Other Branches Visited'))) ~> derivedoctors

query: 'SELECT
    [Serial No],
    [Report ID],
    [Case ID],
    [Patient ID],
    [Branch ID],
    [Test Name],
    [Test Date],
    [Result]
FROM dbo.raw_lab_reports',

query: 'SELECT
    [Serial No],
    [Bill ID],
    [Patient ID],
    [Doctor ID],
    [Medication Name],
    [Dosage],
    [Quantity],
    [Pharmacy Availability],
    [Issued Date]
FROM dbo.raw_prescriptions',

query: 'SELECT
    [Serial No],
    [Case ID],
    [Patient ID],
    [Doctor ID],
    [Branch ID],
    [Surgery Type],
    [Surgery Date],
    [Anesthesia Type],
    [Surgery Outcome],
    [Surgery Duration (hours)],
    [Recovery Period (days)]
FROM dbo.raw_surgeries',
